common.noPermission: You don't have permission to use this.
common.cooldown: Please wait **{seconds}s** before using this again.
common.cannotModSelf: You cannot use this on yourself.
common.cannotModOwner: You cannot use this on the server owner.
common.cannotModHigher: You cannot moderate someone with a higher or equal role.
common.botCannotMod: I don't have permission to moderate this user.

ban.dmNotify: You have been banned from **{guild}**. Reason: {reason}

kick.dmNotify: You have been kicked from **{guild}**. Reason: {reason}

timeout.success: **{user}** has been timed out for **{duration}**. Reason: {reason}

purge.tooMany: You can only purge up to **{max}** messages at once.

help.title: Nexora — Help
help.description: Here are my available commands. Use `/help <command>` for details.

setup.title: Nexora Setup Wizard
setup.welcome:
Welcome to the Nexora Setup Wizard! Let's configure your server.

First, select your **server type** to get recommended settings.
setup.creator: Creator Server
setup.completeDesc: Nexora is now configured for your server. You can modify settings anytime using `/settings` or the dashboard.

spam.action: Action taken: **{action}** — Spam filter triggered ({count} messages in {window}s)

mention.action: Action taken: **{action}** — Mass mention filter triggered

tempvoice.created: Your temporary voice room has been created!
tempvoice.denied: **{user}** has been denied from your room.
tempvoice.kicked: **{user}** has been kicked from your room.
tempvoice.claimed: You have claimed ownership of this room.
tempvoice.notOwner: You are not the owner of this room.
tempvoice.noRoom: You don't have an active voice room.
tempvoice.alreadyExists: You already have an active voice room.

controlPanel.title: 🔊 Voice Room Controls
controlPanel.description: Use the buttons below to manage your temporary voice room.

panel.title: 🎫 Support Tickets
panel.description:
Need help? Select a category below to create a ticket.
Our team will assist you as soon as possible.

tickets.deleted: This ticket will be deleted in 5 seconds.
tickets.memberAdded: **{user}** has been added to this ticket.
tickets.memberRemoved: **{user}** has been removed from this ticket.
tickets.maxTickets: You already have the maximum number of open tickets ({max}).

welcome.test: Here's a preview of your welcome message:

suggestions.implemented: Suggestion #{id} has been marked as implemented.
